content: {"name": "Seraphim of the Damned", "mana_cost": "{2}{W}{B}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["W", "B"], "color_identity": ["W", "B"], "type_line": "Legendary Planeswalker \u2014 Seraphim", "oracle_text": "+1: You gain 2 life and each opponent loses 1 life.\\n0: Exile target creature card from a graveyard. Create a 1/1 white and black Spirit creature token with flying.\\n-6: You get an emblem with \"Whenever a creature you control dies, return it to the battlefield under your control at the beginning of the next end step.\"", "flavor_text": "In death, I found my true calling. In undeath, I serve a higher purpose.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": "3", "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "This WB planeswalker embodies the duality of life and death. The +1 ability provides incremental value through lifegain (white) and life drain (black). The 0 ability combines graveyard interaction (black) with token creation (white), using exile to prevent abuse. The ultimate creates a powerful emblem that gives recursive value to creature strategies. Starting at 3 loyalty makes it vulnerable but allows immediate impact. The design stays within both colors' pie while creating synergy between WB's shared themes of life, death, and spirits."}
